description: otp_encrypt XORs each letter's number with the matching key number (zip), returning a list of numbers
otp_decrypt XORs each cipher number with the matching key number and chr's it back, returning the original message
two_time_leak XORs two ciphertexts position by position, showing the key cancels when reused
Uses zip to pair lists, understands the key must match the message length, a return on every function
